sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: The range danger area consists mainly of Kingsbury Woods and access to these is restricted to times when the range is not in use.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Do not enter the danger area when the range is in use, this is a danger to life. If ‘red flags’ or lights are hoisted, regardless of the timings, do not enter the training area. Learn more about accessing MOD training areas safely .

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The full perimeter of the range danger area is signed to warn of danger.

sourceReferences.citationText: mod-press-office – Guidance: Kingsbury ranges firing times
